fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's intercompany partner code.

fields.name: IC Inbox Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of intercompany inbox you have, either File Location or Database.

fields.name: IC Inbox Details
fields.tooltip: Specifies details about the location of your intercompany inbox, which can transfer intercompany transactions into your company.

fields.name: Auto. Send Transactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies that as soon as transactions arrive in the intercompany outbox, they will be sent to the intercompany partner.

fields.name: Default IC Gen. Jnl. Template
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal template name that will be used to create journal lines as soon as transactions arrive in the intercompany inbox.

fields.name: Default IC Gen. Jnl. Batch
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal batch that will be used to create journal lines as soon as transactions arrive in the intercompany inbox.

fields.name: Partner Code for Acc. Syn.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the partner code with which you want to synchronize the intercompany dimensions.

fields.name: Transaction Notifications
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the system should send you notifications when a new transaction is sent to the intercompany outbox.
